response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: Java is only listed as a skill without project context, German is only basic (not fluent as required), and the resume reflects a senior/lead profile inconsistent with an entry-level role, raising concerns about overqualification and cultural fit.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record in agile practices, TDD, CI/CD, and open-source contributions
Demonstrated ability to lead, teach, and build developer tooling and infrastructure
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, failing to meet fluency requirement
Overqualified with 10+ years of senior experience, misaligned with entry-level role
Java experience is listed but not demonstrated in professional projects; primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/D
